title: Greater / Less
subtitle: Greater or less?
goal: Learn to compare values using >, <, >=, and <=.
explanation: JavaScript can check whether one value is greater or less than another.
The >= and <= operators also include equality.
Every comparison returns either true or false.

analogy.title: Analogy
analogy.text: Imagine a balance scale. JavaScript places the values on opposite sides and determines which one is heavier.

remember: >= means greater than or equal to.
<= means less than or equal to.

mistake.title: Common mistake
mistake.text: Beginners sometimes confuse the direction of the > and < symbols. Remember: the wide side faces the greater number.
